category_sources: Official GitHub README describes Pangene as a command-line tool to construct pangenome gene graphs.
source_facts.description says it constructs pangenome gene graphs.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses the name Pangene.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation and usage surface for pangene.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/lh3/pangene; per instructions, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official pangene README explains pangenome gene graph construction from miniprot alignments and GFA output.
